changeSet.author: asset-app
changeSet.sql: UPDATE sequence_generator SET next_val = GREATEST( next_val, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM asset_group), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM asset_line), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM asset_item), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM supplier), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM department), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM employee), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM location), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM equipment), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM consumable_stock), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM stock_receipt), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM stock_receipt_line), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM stock_issue), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM stock_issue_line), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM allocation_request), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM allocation_request_line), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM repair_request), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM return_request), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM return_request_line), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM equipment_assignment), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM consumable_assignment), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM app_audit_log), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM stock_document_event), (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM jhi_user) ) WHERE sequence_name = 'default';
